title: viola flavicornis var. montana
intro: Viola flavicornis var. montana, also known as the yellow-horned pansy, is a subspecies of the viola flavicornis plant, a type of flowering plant belonging to the violet family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Viola flavicornis var. montana include reducing inflammation and improving skin conditions, as well as providing antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. This plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
